hooks.name: Agent Roster — Session Orient
hooks.description: Reminds every session to read AGENT_ROSTER.md and AGENT_QUICKSTART.md before invoking any sub-agent.

action.prompt:
Before invoking any sub-agent this session, orient against the canonical Academorix agent stack:

1. Read `AGENT_ROSTER.md` at the workspace root. It carries the 8-phase pipeline, the full 51-agent roster grouped by phase, the org chart, orchestration mechanics, and governance rules. Every routing decision this session must cite a specific phase or reviewer-verticals matrix entry from that file.

2. Read `AGENT_QUICKSTART.md` (if present) for the two-minute onboard narrative.

3. Skim `.kiro/agents/README.md` for the operational agent directory, the task-to-agent mapping tables, and the reviewer verticals matrix (Part V.3 of the roster).

4. When invoking `invoke_sub_agent`, always name the phase the work belongs to (Phase 0 Intake, Phase 1 Discovery, ..., Phase 7 Operate). If the phase is ambiguous, that is a routing bug — resolve it before dispatching.

5. Non-overlap is a governance rule (`AGENT_ROSTER.md §VI.1`). Two agents never own the same concern. If two reviewers would file on the same finding, route to the owner per the matrix in `.kiro/agents/README.md §Reviewer verticals matrix`.

Do not summarise these files in your reply; just read them and proceed with the user's request.
